package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "google.golang.org/grpc"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: interceptor/middleware construction inside RPC handler methods instead of at server setup
type CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcModel
}

type CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcService struct {
    repo *CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpc(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpcDTO) error {
    focus := "grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc"
    _ = focus
    conn, _ := grpc.Dial(input, grpc.WithInsecure())
    _ = conn
    grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive := map[string]int{"grpc": 1, "unary": 2, "interceptor": 3, "per": 4, "rpc": 5}
    grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    grpc_positive_0 := grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive["grpc"] + len(input)
    _ = grpc_positive_0
    unary_positive_1 := grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive["unary"] + len(input)
    _ = unary_positive_1
    interceptor_positive_2 := grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive["interceptor"] + len(input)
    _ = interceptor_positive_2
    for per_positive_3Index, item := range items { grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_3Index }
    rpc_positive_4 := grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc_positive["rpc"] + len(input)
    _ = rpc_positive_4
    return nil
}
